en_title: 'We Need to Change Course' — Bethesda Boss Tells Staff the Company Must Focus on 'Our Strongest Franchises' as Xbox Layoffs Hit Hard
cn_title: XBOX裁员后，贝塞斯达负责人称必须聚焦最强系列
subtitle: 裁员重创B社
opus_summary: 在XBOX大规模裁员之际，Bethesda负责人Jill Braff告诉员工，公司需要改变方向，从以各独立工作室为中心的规划模式，转向聚焦最强系列和更整体的内容路线图。

paragraphs.en: The boss of Bethesda has told staff the company must now focus on its 鈥渟trongest franchises鈥?amid sweeping layoffs across Xbox.
paragraphs.cn: 在XBOX大规模裁员之际，Bethesda负责人告诉员工，公司现在必须专注于自己的「最强系列」。

paragraphs.en: Today, , with 1,600 of those layoffs happening today, July 6. In an email sent to staff, Xbox CEO Asha Sharma called it the most 鈥渟ignificant鈥?restructure in Xbox history, insisting Microsoft鈥檚 gaming business 鈥渋s not healthy.鈥?Overall, Xbox is losing about one-fifth of its staff as part of Sharma's push for growth.
paragraphs.cn: 今天，XBOX裁员中有1600人会在7月6日当天离职。在发给员工的邮件中，XBOX CEO Asha Sharma称这是XBOX史上最「重大」的重组，并坚称Microsoft的游戏业务「并不健康」。总体而言，作为Sharma推动增长的一部分，XBOX将失去约五分之一员工。

paragraphs.en: Bethesda is hit particularly hard by the layoffs, IGN understands, with staff across its many development studios either already told they are cut or facing an uncertain future. In an email to Bethesda staff sent following Sharma's memo, Bethesda boss Jill Braff said the layoffs and change in strategy 鈥渞eflect the realities of our industry and business 鈥?and our responsibility to ensure Bethesda is operating from a more stable foundation.鈥?,
paragraphs.cn: IGN了解到，Bethesda在这轮裁员中受到的打击尤其严重，旗下多家开发工作室的员工要么已经被告知遭裁，要么正面对不确定的未来。在Sharma备忘录之后发给Bethesda员工的一封邮件中，Bethesda负责人Jill Braff表示，裁员和战略变化「反映了我们行业和业务的现实，也反映了我们有责任确保Bethesda在更稳定的基础上运营。」

paragraphs.en: "To be successful in the future, we need to change course,鈥?Braff continued. 鈥淲e must strengthen our business, return to sustainable growth, and ensure we can continue investing in our franchises and our players. I know that doesn't make a day like today any easier.鈥?,
paragraphs.cn: Braff继续写道：「为了在未来取得成功，我们需要改变方向。我们必须强化业务，回到可持续增长，并确保能够继续投资我们的系列和玩家。我知道，这并不会让今天这样的日子变得更轻松。」

paragraphs.en: But what does that actually mean beyond layoffs at the likes of id Software, ZeniMax Online Studios, and elsewhere at Bethesda? Without naming games, Braff said 鈥渢o best position Bethesda for future growth, we are shifting from a planning model primarily centered on what's next for each independent studio to one that focuses on our strongest franchises and determining the content roadmap that best serves our players and Bethesda as a whole.鈥?,
paragraphs.cn: 但除了id Software、ZeniMax Online Studios以及Bethesda其他部门裁员之外，这到底意味着什么？Braff没有点名具体游戏，但她表示：「为了让Bethesda在未来增长中处于最佳位置，我们正从主要围绕每家独立工作室下一步做什么的规划模式，转向一种聚焦我们最强系列，并确定最能服务玩家和Bethesda整体的内容路线图的模式。」

paragraphs.en: 鈥淔rom there, we鈥檒l align the right talent, technology, and resources across the organization to deliver on those priorities,鈥?Braff added.
paragraphs.cn: Braff补充说：「在此基础上，我们会在整个组织内匹配合适的人才、技术和资源，以兑现这些优先事项。」

paragraphs.en: IGN has already explored how the changes at Bethesda mean focusing on big hitters such as The Elder Scrolls and Fallout, leaving Starfield potentially out in the cold . With Microsoft planning to sell or close Arkane Lyon, Marvel鈥檚 Blade may fall by the wayside or be published elsewhere . The Elder Scrolls Online developer ZeniMax Online Studios has already signalled content roadmap changes with fewer staff following the layoffs. Meanwhile id Software, developer of the Doom games, has suffered significant cuts. MachineGames has survived the cull, with a new Wolfenstein game pretty much an open secret at this point . But it鈥檚 looking increasingly unlikely that Indiana Jones and the Great Circle will get the sequel it teased at the end of the game.
paragraphs.cn: IGN此前已经探讨过，Bethesda的变化意味着公司将专注《上古卷轴》和《辐射》等重磅系列，可能让《星空》被冷落。随着Microsoft计划出售或关闭Arkane Lyon，漫威《刀锋战士》可能被搁置，或交由其他地方发行。《上古卷轴OL》开发商ZeniMax Online Studios已经暗示，在裁员导致人手减少后，其内容路线图会发生变化。与此同时，《毁灭战士》系列开发商id Software也遭遇大幅裁员。MachineGames躲过了这轮清洗，而一款新的《德军总部》游戏如今几乎已经是公开秘密。但《夺宝奇兵：古老之圈》在游戏结尾暗示的续作，看起来越来越不可能出现。

paragraphs.en: With such a reduced headcount, id Software may be left to support other games in development at Bethesda, such as MachineGames鈥?Wolfenstein 3 and perhaps even a future Fallout game, both of which have first-person shooting 鈥?the genre id specialises in. Where that leaves the likes of Doom and Quake is unclear.
paragraphs.cn: 在人手大幅减少的情况下，id Software可能会被留下来支持Bethesda旗下其他正在开发的游戏，例如MachineGames的《德军总部3》，甚至可能还有未来的《辐射》游戏。这两者都包含第一人称射击内容，而这正是id擅长的类型。至于《毁灭战士》和《雷神之锤》等系列会被放到什么位置，目前仍不清楚。

paragraphs.en: Meanwhile, with Xbox hammering on the door of Fallout, New Vegas developer Obsidian, which is without a confirmed new project following the commercial failure of last year鈥檚 Avowed and The Outer Worlds 2, may be tasked with making a new game in the franchise. If that happens, could Bethesda studios help out?
paragraphs.cn: 与此同时，在XBOX不断敲《辐射：新维加斯》开发商Obsidian大门的情况下，后者可能会被指派制作一款新的《辐射》游戏。Obsidian在去年的《宣誓》和《天外世界2》商业失败后，目前还没有确认的新项目。如果这件事发生，Bethesda旗下工作室是否会提供协助？

paragraphs.en: 鈥淏y working more closely across the organization, sharing expertise and capabilities, and focusing our investments on the opportunities with the greatest potential, we believe we can better support our franchises and IP with meaningful long-term potential,鈥?Braff continued in the email.
paragraphs.cn: Braff在邮件中继续写道：「通过在整个组织内更紧密合作，分享专业知识和能力，并把投资集中在最具潜力的机会之上，我们相信自己能够更好地支持那些拥有有意义长期潜力的系列和IP。」

paragraphs.en: Bethesda Game Studios has The Elder Scrolls 6 in the works, and the hope is it will launch in the coming years. Development chief Todd Howard has indicated multiple times that Fallout 5 will follow, but it was thought that that sequel wouldn鈥檛 materialize for many, many years. Perhaps following this Xbox reset, it could be closer than expected.
paragraphs.cn: Bethesda Game Studios正在开发《上古卷轴6》，外界希望它能在未来几年推出。开发负责人Todd Howard曾多次表示《辐射5》会随后到来，但此前普遍认为这部续作还要很多很多年才会真正出现。也许在这次XBOX重置之后，它会比预期更近。
